_comment: Only the DATABASE connection can be seeded here (OPTIONAL). Admin account, object storage, and the release API key live IN THE DATABASE and are configured at /admin. With nothing set, the app boots and the dashboard drives setup.
_appReleaseComment: Metadata for the self-update check. The APK is hosted on GitHub Releases (not this backend). Bump versionCode + sha256 here when you publish a new APK; the app downloads downloadUrl and verifies sha256.

AppRelease.Notes: Keeps the screen awake during playback so the TV screensaver no longer interrupts videos.
